title: Reverse Proxies, Forwarded Trust, Message Framing, and Smuggling Defense · Changed-Input Lab
summary: An independent service team receives a different API, load, trust, persistence, and failure constraint and must transfer reverse proxies, forwarded trust, message framing, and smuggling defense into a new proxy rewrite and parser-consistency threat model. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of proxy rewrite and parser-consistency threat model with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal de…
objectives: Trace downstream and upstream connections, hop-by-hop versus end-to-end fields, termination points, authority, scheme, client address, and failure ownership.
Use ReverseProxy.Rewrite with separate inbound and outbound requests, SetURL and reviewed SetXForwarded behavior, and reject deprecated Director trust assumptions.
Strip untrusted forwarding fields, rebuild them only at trusted hops, constrain backend targets, remove hop-by-hop state, and prevent header spoofing.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Go server Commit to the mission model · Lab Proxy Hop Origin Model
steps.instruction:
lab case — A lab team handles case 8131 in a multi-tenant case service with a bounded PostgreSQL pool. Build deterministic Go evidence to reject ambiguous framing and deprecated Director-style proxy mutation; then drain the old revision while a canary fails its changed-case invariant. Browser code models decisions only. Listener, TLS, database, proxy, race, load, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Trace downstream and upstream connections, hop-by-hop versus end-to-end fields, termination points, authority, scheme, client address, and failure ownership.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Go server Commit to the mission model · Lab Proxy Hop Origin Model.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for trace downstream and upstream connections, hop-by-hop versus end-to-end fields, termination points, authority, scheme, client address, and failure ownership. For Go server Commit to the mission model · Lab Proxy Hop Origin Model, keep Proxy Hop Origin Model connected to executable HTTP client decision evidence.
